events.title: Sticker Boom + Golden Blitz 3 (Simpsons) — Final Hours
events.blurb: Sticker Boom and Golden Blitz 3 are in their FINAL HOURS today (ends ~10 AM UTC July 12). Sticker Boom gives +50% stickers per pack in a 15-minute activation window; Golden Blitz unlocks trading of previously locked Simpsons gold stickers. If you haven't activated yet, this is your absolute last chance — trade those locked Simpsons golds now before the window closes for good.

events.title: The Simpsons Album
events.blurb: Simpsons album closes July 29 — 17 days left. 21 sets, 189 stickers, 34 gold total. Golden Blitz 3 just ended today (July 12). Trade Fest (doubled daily trades, July 8–10) has also ended — standard 5-trade daily limit is back. Demand for Simpsons gold stickers remains peak. If you're holding gold dupes, list them now — completionists are desperate and highly motivated to deal.

events.title: Krustyland Invasion (Episode Stickers Set 3)
events.blurb: Episode Set 3 runs through July 15 — just 3 days left. 9 Simpsons stickers with brutal drop rates on golds. When this ends, all unopened Episode Packs auto-convert to the next set — you lose any current-set value. Trade your Set 3 dupes this week or they stop being useful for active completions.

events.title: Summer Splash
events.blurb: Summer quest chain runs all season — card dupes stack up fast during the grind. Get your H:/W: list posted before the next Cards Boom so you're first in line when supply floods the community. Gold Card Trade events are the only window to move locked golds — watch for the pop-up and have your list ready.

talkingPoints: Sticker Boom + Golden Blitz 3 are in their FINAL HOURS today in Monopoly GO (ends ~10 AM UTC July 12). If you haven't activated Sticker Boom yet, this is your last window. Golden Blitz unlocks trading of locked Simpsons gold stickers — act now before it closes.

The Simpsons album closes July 29 — 17 days left. Trade Fest (doubled daily trades) ended July 10. Standard 5-trade daily limit is back. Simpsons gold sticker demand is still at peak — if you hold gold dupes, you're sitting on the hottest trade asset of the season.

Krustyland Invasion Episode Set 3 ends July 15 — just 3 days. After it closes, all unopened Episode Packs auto-convert to the next set. Trade your Set 3 dupes this week or they lose their value for active completions.
Watch for the next Cards Boom in Coin Master — it drops 50% extra cards from every chest, which means a flood of duplicates. The traders who post their H:/W: *before* it hits clear the most.

Gold Card Trade events in Coin Master are the only window to move locked gold cards — typically 24-48 hours, a few times a year. If you've got golds sitting idle, that event is your one shot to convert them into a completed set.
Pro tip: scan your whole album once and SwapDeck shows you every player who's missing a card you have spare. Beats scrolling H:/W: lists by hand.
Stuck one card from finishing a set? Post it — someone here almost certainly has it as a dupe collecting dust.
Golden cards are the hardest to move solo. The Trade Chain + matching tools exist specifically to connect you with the right holder faster.

Scam reports are a constant undercurrent in r/MonopolyGoTrading and Coin Master Facebook groups — 'sent them the sticker and they deleted me' posts appear daily. A verified trade log is your best protection in any platform trade.
Board Adventure is Coin Master's standalone card-collecting app — if you're playing both, make sure your H:/W: lists cover both games so you don't miss a cross-game trade partner.

Coin Master's in-game trading requires both players to be Facebook friends — which is exactly why external matching tools exist. If you're not using a platform to find trade partners first, you're trading blind.

Scopely's MONOPOLY GO! x The Simpsons crossover is their biggest collab of 2026 and it's performing exceptionally well per Scopely's own newsroom. Simpsons album drew lapsed players back in — more active traders in the pool means faster matches right now.
r/MonopolyGoTrading has 126K+ subscribers actively posting trades. If you're matching off-platform, that community is your widest net for finding a specific sticker holder.
